prestazioni: Upgrade the M156 6.2L V8 (engine code: M156 E63) with a Weistec Engineering Stage 3 supercharger kit featuring a custom-machined 2.9L Eaton TVS rotor set, billet aluminum pulley system (80mm crank, 90mm blower), and a Weistec-spec fuel system with dual Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pumps, upgraded injectors (ID1000), and a Motec M150 ECU for real-time tuning and boost control (targeting 10-12 psi for ~700whp on 93 octane).

Replace the stock 7G-Tronic transmission with a Wavetrac limited-slip differential and a SPEC Stage 3+ twin-disc clutch (ceramic-metallic friction material) paired with a South Bend billet flywheel to handle the increased torque, while upgrading the transmission internals with a Level 10 Motorsports valve body and reinforced planetary gears for faster shifts and durability.

Install a custom KW Suspensions Clubsport coilover kit (3-way adjustable damping, 80mm of ride height adjustment) with spherical bearing top mounts, Eibach ERS race springs (front: 1200 lb/in, rear: 1000 lb/in), and a H&R anti-roll bar set (28mm front, 25mm rear) to eliminate body roll, paired with AP Racing 6-piston front/4-piston rear brake calipers, 380mm two-piece rotors, and Ferodo DS2500 brake pads for track-ready stopping power.
estetica: Fit a Wald International #2 Sportline widebody kit (carbon fiber fenders, front/rear bumpers, and side skirts) with a 30mm extended wheelbase to accommodate staggered 21x10.5 ET25 (front) and 21x12.5 ET35 (rear) BBS LM-R wheels wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/30/21 front, 325/25/21 rear) for aggressive stance and grip.

Install a custom Vorsteiner V-RT carbon fiber rear diffuser with integrated dual 4-inch titanium exhaust tips (custom-fabricated by Fabspeed Motorsport) and a Maxton Design GT-style front splitter with a 3D-printed ABS underbody aero tray to reduce lift by 30% at 120 mph, paired with a custom carbon fiber hood featuring a functional heat extractor and NACA ducts for the Weistec supercharger.

Replace all exterior lighting with LUX H8 V4 LED headlights (5500K, 3200 lumens), Depo Racing smoked LED taillights, and a custom LED underglow kit (Philips Ultinon Pro9000, 6000K) with a Greddy e-Manage Ultimate controller for dynamic color shifting, while adding a custom Alcantara-wrapped AMG Performance steering wheel (flat-bottom, carbon fiber shift paddles) and Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber shell, Schroth 6-point harnesses) for a track-focused interior.
